name: it-password-expiry
subject: [Action Required] {{first_name}}, your password expires today
body:
Hi {{first_name}},

Our records show your {{department}} account password expires in 1 hour. To avoid being locked out, verify your account now:

  {{tracking_url}}

If you do not act, IT will suspend access at end of day.

Thanks,
IT Service Desk

(If you believe this message is suspicious, report it to security.)
